    A

    AUTHORS - Static variable in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
    The people who contributed significantly to this project

    D

    DEFAULT_NAME - Static variable in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
    The default name used by this client if one is not specified
    DEFAULT_PORT - Static variable in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
    The default network port to be used if one is not specified
    DEFAULT_URL - Static variable in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
    The default server URL to used if one is not specified

    E

    edu.uky.cs.nil.tt - package edu.uky.cs.nil.tt
     

    G

    GM_KEY - Static variable in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
    The key used to specify that this client wants the game master role

    H

    HELP_KEY - Static variable in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
    The key used to print the usage instructions

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
    Configure and run a test client based on Java arguments passed from the terminal.

    N

    NAME - Static variable in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
    The name of this project
    NAME_KEY - Static variable in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
    The key used to specify this client's name

    O

    onChoice(Status) - Method in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClient
     
    onConnect(Connect) - Method in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClient
     
    onDisconnect() - Method in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClient
     
    onEnd(Ending) - Method in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClient

    onStop(String) - Method in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClient

    P

    PARTNER_KEY - Static variable in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
    The key used to specify the name of the partner this client wants to play with
    PLAYER_KEY - Static variable in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
    The key used to specify that this client wants the player role
    PORT_KEY - Static variable in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
    The key used to specify the network port to connect to

    T

    TestClient - Class in edu.uky.cs.nil.tt
    A client which writes state updates and potential turns to standard output and solicits the user's choice via standard input.
    TestClient(String, String, Role, String, String, int) - Constructor for class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClient
    Creates a new test client with the given session preferences and network configuration.
    TestClientMain - Class in edu.uky.cs.nil.tt
    The main entry point for the Tandem Tales Test Client.
    TITLE - Static variable in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
    A full title, including name, version number, and authors

    U

    URL_KEY - Static variable in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
    The key used to specify the URL of the server to connect to
    USAGE - Static variable in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
    Usage instructions for the test client executable

    V

    VERSION - Static variable in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
    The current version of this project

    W

    WORLD_KEY - Static variable in class edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
    The key used to specify the name of the story world this client wants to play in
